title: Mother's Stage 4 colon
body: So my mom, 68,  was diagnosed with S4 colon cancer back in Oct 2017. Things are not going well. After three separate chemos, doctors have determined that her tumor has expanded to other organs, and have terminated further treatments. My sister is a cardiovascular doctor. I have tried to convince them to try something natural, but my sister is the typical sceptical doctor attitude. I've read that cancer patients that drinks lots of pureed carrots, mistletoe, and other natural choices far extend there life. Any recommendations for natural treatments that have worked well?
